stemHtml: A turboprop aircraft is fitted with inflatable rubber bands for de-icing the leading edge of their wings, how do these devices work?

options.a: Hot oil is expelled through the pores of the rubber bands
options.b: By inflating the rubber bands with pressurised bleed air in an alternating pattern.
options.c: They allow hot bleed air to be expelled through the leading edge.
options.d: They are electrically heated and are automatically activated upon ice detection.
